STEP_1_hook_created.evidence: src/lib/intelligence/useAdminIntelligence.ts — TanStack Query v5, 4 queries (metrics, signals, apiHealth, feedHealth), realtime subscription on market_signals INSERT, isLive flag, refetch()

STEP_2_dashboard_wired.evidence: src/pages/admin/IntelligenceDashboard.tsx imports useAdminIntelligence (not adminIntelligence.ts). LiveDemoBadge, DashboardSkeleton, ApiStatusIcon, DirectionIcon all implemented. Signal CREATE writes to market_signals DB.

STEP_3_no_static_imports.evidence: IntelligenceDashboard.tsx has zero imports from adminIntelligence.ts. adminIntelligence.ts marked @deprecated with note pointing to useAdminIntelligence.

STEP_4_live_demo_badge.evidence: LiveDemoBadge component present — renders LIVE (green) when isLive=true, DEMO (amber) when false. isLive derived from enabled && !error && data !== undefined.

STEP_5_api_feed_panels.evidence: API Health Panel: apiHealth[] from api_registry query, renders per-row status (pass/fail/timeout/untested). Feed Status Strip: feedHealth[] from data_feeds query, renders last_fetched_at + last_error.

STEP_6_verify.evidence: npx tsc --noEmit → 0 errors. npm run build → ✓ built in 6.18s. No hardcoded static data imports in IntelligenceDashboard.

hub-shell-detector.evidence: IntelligenceDashboard.tsx: live_data via useAdminIntelligence, loading skeleton (DashboardSkeleton), error state present, CRUD (signal create to DB), metrics panel. Non-shell.

live-demo-detector.evidence: LIVE/DEMO badge present via LiveDemoBadge component. isLive derived from real DB query state — not hardcoded. No unlabeled mock data on user-facing surface.

dev-best-practice-checker.evidence: All data fetching via TanStack Query v5 useQuery. No raw useEffect + supabase.from() patterns in useAdminIntelligence.ts. Realtime via supabase.channel() only (not data fetching — compliant).

notes: adminIntelligence.ts retained but marked @deprecated — safe to delete after BUILD 2 QA pass
useAdminIntelligence realtime channel subscribes to market_signals INSERT — invalidates both signals + metrics queries
data_feeds table may be empty initially — feedHealth gracefully returns [] with no error
